[[File:Rennokk.jpg|thumb|right|The mountains of Rennokk.]]
'''Rennokk''' was a moon of [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. It was a molten planetoid, its glow visible on Cularin. [[Reidi Artom]]'s survey of the moon indicated there were minerals of interest in the lava of the planet, but nobody had attempted to reach those minerals by [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]].<ref name="LFC" />

Rocky outcroppings rising out of the magma made it possible to land on the planet. Reidi Artom landed on the tallest one and dubbed it [[Artom's Crest]]. A rumored metallic [[The Cave City|city in a cave]] was also said to exist on Rennokk.<ref name="LFC" />

There were reported to be life forms on Rennokk. Artom visited the planet a second time with a [[Environment suit/Legends|enviro-suit]] and found something apparently alive that chased her; she escaped and swore not to come back without firepower. A century after Reidi Artom's survey, an expedition to the moon was attacked by a worm-like lava creature. Only one member of the expedition survived, though accounts varied on whether this survivor was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] named [[Tusskrek]] or a [[Tarasin]] named [[Kum'Jushkin]].<ref name="LFC" />
